description: This document outlines the real-time broadcast events intended to replace polling for online users and waiting games.

usersOnline.trigger: A user registers via 'registerPlayer' or disconnects.
usersOnline.frontendAction: Replace 'GET /api/v1/users/online' polling with this event. Call the HTTP endpoint once on mount, then listen for this event to keep the UI in sync.

waitingGames.trigger: A new game is created or a waiting game is joined/cancelled.
waitingGames.frontendAction: Replace 'GET /api/v1/game/waiting' polling with this event. Call the HTTP endpoint once on mount, then listen for this event.
